## [Note]

dbbot v0.13.0 keeps the control-node bootstrap path compatible with operating systems whose default Python 3 package is still Python 3.6.

## [Change]

- Clarify MySQL regression guidance for minimal openEuler and Anolis OS 8 control nodes that may require `tar` to be installed before manually extracting a dbbot release package.

## [Fix]

- Restore `dbbotctl support` compatibility with Python 3.6 control hosts by removing a Python 3.7-only future import from the support matrix reader.
